scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/tokens build && bun run --cwd apps/gallery build
scripts.dev: bun run --cwd packages/tokens build && bun run --cwd apps/gallery dev
scripts.check: bun run --cwd packages/tokens check && bun run --cwd apps/gallery check
scripts.quality: biome check . && bun run check && bun test
scripts.ci: biome ci . && bun run check && bun test && bun run build
